qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Drive-prefixed absolute symlink targets escape the extraction root
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same src/unpack.ts linkpath-sanitization flaw as the advisory: escape validation resolves the original drive-prefixed linkpath, then entry.linkpath is rewritten to the stripped relative traversal before symlink creation uses it.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Negative tar entry sizes crash default async parse surfaces
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding is a parser size-validation crash in header/read-entry handling and does not involve the advisory's symlink linkpath stripping and escape-check mismatch in Unpack.

selected_finding.title: Drive-prefixed absolute symlink targets escape the extraction root

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding identifies the same validation-after-rewrite bug the advisory fixes in src/unpack.ts, and the advisory-specific PoC on v7.5.10 showed that a drive-relative linkpath C:../../../target.txt is accepted, rewritten to ../../../target.txt, and then used to overwrite a file outside the extraction cwd.
evidence: The finding report and the advisory both describe Unpack[STRIPABSOLUTEPATH] checking escape against the original drive-prefixed linkpath and only afterwards storing the stripped relative traversal that symlink creation uses.
Upstream fix f48b5fa3b7985ddab96dc0f2125a4ffc9911b6ad changes the escape-resolution input from p to parts.join('/'), which directly matches the reported root cause.

Run log /Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_b21655f7/.judge/poc_runs/drive_prefixed_symlink_escape/run.log records EVOHUNT_PROOF, linkTarget ../../../target.txt, and outsideContents PWNED after writing through the extracted symlink.

poc_executions.command: cd workspace/target-repo && npm_config_fund=false npm_config_audit=false npm ci && npm run prepare && cd .. && node reproduction/exploit.js "$PWD/target-repo"
poc_executions.observed_effect: The adapted PoC extracted a symlink from drive-relative linkpath C:../../../target.txt, produced readlink target ../../../target.txt, and writing through cwd/a/b/l changed the outside target file contents to PWNED.
